Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 21,2002
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Deborah Neville. H. Carole McEwen, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Court takes evidence and good cause appearing, signs judgment as follows: Principal: $26,965.97; late charges: $203.00; Pre-judgment Interest: $1,594.08; Fees: $660.00 for a total judgment of $29,423.05. Counsel to present judgment for Court's signature.
